notes: One shared AI-credits ledger per business. Monthly grant per plan (starter 10, market 100, business 500, enterprise fair-use). IAP AI-credit bundles top it up (via receipt verification). Any AI endpoint debits on SUCCESS only, weighted: voice parse 1; insight 5; risk score 5. The Usage screen renders the AI-credits meter (screen-backed READ); the ledger mechanics/debit rules here are backend-only. Insufficient credits -> 403 PLAN_REQUIRED-style block or 402-equivalent per conventions error envelope.
